definition:
1. a tool, implement :—;mostly in plural τεύχεα, 
2. implements of war, armour, arms, harness , (Homer);—;so τεύχη in [variant datesTragica Adespota 
3. in plural, also, the gear  of a ship, tackle , (Odyssey by Homer) 
4. in singular a vessel  of any kind, a bathing-tub , (Aeschulus Tragicus); a cinerary urn , (Aeschulus Tragicus); a balloting-urn , (Aeschulus Tragicus); a vase for libations , (Aeschulus Tragicus); a vase  or ewer  for water, (Euripides); a pot  or jar , (Xenophon Historicus); ξύλινα τ. chests , (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. the human frame, body , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
6. a book , [variant datesAnthology Palantina; hence πεντάτευχος, the Pentateuch.  (ML)
